data.body: Remediated 2nd BLOCK: instead of adding a TOML-writer dep (regresses stdlib-only core) or hand-splicing arbitrary user TOML (fragile), NARROWED the write surface — never edit a user pyproject.toml; always write a rebar-owned rebar.toml (line-upsert [jira]) or legacy dotted conf. Added _bridge_probe(extra_env=...) for the env bridge, help/jira-onboard.txt, malformed-file/TOCTOU/--reset confirmation handling, docs target docs/jira-sync-setup.md, and the full failure-path test list.
